rationale: Both papers center on CLV-based customer selection and resource allocation: the citing study builds a CLV allocation model, while the cited study proposes a Bayesian decision-theory CLV selection framework under budget and uncertainty. The citing note says it extends prior CLV customer-selection/resource-allocation work, and the cited paper is directly in that methodological core rather than a generic background citation. This makes the citation plausibly substantive and worth second-stage review.
